name: AB Testing Framework
description: AB Testing Framework - Marketing template for analytics professionals
instructions: HOW TO USE THIS TEMPLATE Step 1: Build Your Test Backlog Capture every test idea in the Test Backlog. Score each using ICE (Impact 1-10, Confidence 1-10, Ease 1-10). The average score auto-calculates to help you prioritise. Step 2: Plan Your Test For each test you decide to run, create a detailed plan in the Test Planner. Define your hypothesis, control, variant, primary metric, and minimum sample size. Step 3: Use the Sample Size Calculator Before launching, check the Sample Size Calculator to ensure you will have enough traffic/volume to achieve statistical significance. Step 4: Schedule on
